title: ROMANIA enforcement action against Public and Private Domain SA (3,000)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Romanian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 3,000 on Public and Private Domain SA. The controller used body cameras to monitor its employees, even though less intrusive methods were available. Additionally, the controller failed to adequately inform its employees about the processing. Legal basi...
